name: Spinach Puree
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the spinach in a covered pot without added water until tender and very bright green.
2. Transfer the cooked spinach to a blender.
3. Add 1/4 cup water to the spinach in the blender.
4. Puree the mixture until very smooth.
5. Place the puree in a small bowl.
6. Thin the puree to the desired consistency, if needed.
7. Season with minced garlic, salt, and black pepper to taste.
8. Serve over cold pasta or hot baked potatoes.
